notes: Full Replay Viewer (match timeline, 3 camera views, Real-Time/Action-by-Action/Turn-by-Turn playback modes, adjustable speed, hand visibility toggle), a new local Replays screen, cloud match sharing (auto-uploaded replays, searchable by username, downloadable from Friends or search), a Windowed/Fullscreen display toggle in Settings, and early ST-31 card data. Plus a Settings screen layout fix.
